calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Advanced From Nov-19-18 To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Carlin Holden (Petitioner).

Mr. Melbostad stated that Ms. Holden did not charge for preparation of the family tree and that they were advanced costs for the Genealogical Research Firm in the amount of $1,755.00 and $195.00 for skip tracing. Mr. Melbostad also stated that he is withdrawing his request for preparation of the petition for special letters in the amount of $1,472.50 ($475.00, $237.50 and $760.00) leaving a balance of $10,982.50 for compensation, and that he did not request extraordinary fees for the special letters. The First and Final Account and Report, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

Ex Parte Petition To Advance The Hearing Date
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Motion For Reconsideration Of Order After Hearing Denying Amended Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Zach Webster and Paul H. Melbostad for Carlin Paige Holden.

-No tentative ruling previously issued.-

Matter called.

Counsel present argument in support of Petitioner Carlin Paige Holden's Motion for Reconsideration of Order After Hearing Denying Amended Petition for Probate.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court took Petitioner Carlin Paige Holden's Motion for Reconsideration of Order After Hearing Denying Amended Petition for Probate under submission.
Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. Matter Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad and Zach Webster for and with Carlin Holden.

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to the handwritten will and the typed dictated will being admitted as the integrated will, spoke of the Decedent's medical condition, the Decedent's intentions, the lack of relationship between the Decedent and the surviving family members, the declarations of three parties authenticating the Decedent's hand writing, the Advanced Health Care Directive, Ms. Holden's relationship with the Decedent, language in the holographic will, Ms. Holden's assistance with typing of the will, etc. Mr. Webster argued that a signature can be in the form of a mark and cited the following authorities: Estate of Black 30 Cal.3d 880; Estate of Edwardson 186 Cal.App.2d 122 (1960); Estate of Southworth (1996) Cal.App. 4th 564. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
